---
title: "doge2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)

# Initialize an empty list to store results
all_data <- list()

# Loop through all 68 pages
for (page in 1:68) {
  url <- paste0("https://api.doge.gov/savings/leases?sort_by=value&sort_order=asc&page=", page, "&per_page=400")
  response <- GET(url)
  
  if (status_code(response) != 200) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve data on page", page, ":", status_code(response)))
    next  # Skip this page if there's an error
  }
  
  content_text <- content(response, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  content_json <- fromJSON(content_text, flatten = TRUE)

  # Check if JSON has data and is not empty
  if (length(content_json) == 0 || !is.list(content_json)) {
    warning(paste("Page", page, "returned an empty or invalid JSON response. Skipping."))
    next
  }

  # Extract main data - Adjust this based on the actual structure
  if ("data" %in% names(content_json)) {
    data_page <- as.data.frame(content_json$data)
  } else {
    data_page <- as.data.frame(content_json)  # Fallback if no "data" key
  }

  # Ensure the dataframe is not empty
  if (nrow(data_page) == 0) {
    warning(paste("Page", page, "returned an empty dataframe. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  
  # Append to list
 if (!is.null(data_page) && nrow(data_page) > 0) {
  all_data[[length(all_data) + 1]] <- data_page
  print(paste("Page", page, "retrieved successfully with", nrow(data_page), "rows"))
} else {
  warning(paste("Skipping Page", page, "due to empty or invalid data"))
}

# Ensure all data frames have the same columns
if (length(all_data) > 0) {
  common_cols <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all_data, colnames))  # Get common column names
  all_data <- lapply(all_data, function(df) df[, common_cols, drop = FALSE])  # Keep only common columns
  
  # Combine all non-empty data frames
  full_data <- bind_rows(all_data)
} else {
  full_data <- data.frame()  # Return an empty dataframe if no data
}

# View final dataset
print(paste("Final dataset contains", nrow(full_data), "rows"))




```

```{r}
write.csv(full_data,"~/Downloads/doge.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(maryland,"~/Downloads/maryland_doge.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
colnames(full_data)
```

```{r}
maryland <- full_data %>% 
  clean_names()
maryland <- maryland %>% 
 mutate(state = sub(".*,\\s*", "", result_leases_location)) %>%  # Extract text after the comma
  filter(state %in% c("MD", "DC"))  # Keep only Maryland & DC locations

maryland <- maryland %>% 
  distinct()
#26 values
```

```{r}
sum(maryland$result_leases_savings, na.rm = TRUE)
```
